title: Horrifying video shows moment Frontier Airlines plane hits person on Denver runway
summary_full: A shocking incident at Denver International Airport saw a person, who allegedly breached security, fatally struck by a departing Frontier Airlines jet. The collision ignited an engine fire, forcing an emergency evacuation. Several passengers sustained minor injuries during the chaotic scene, with the NTSB now reviewing the evacuation response.
